MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM CO., INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES
Appearances: Anne T. Acuna of Brayton Purcell (415-898-1555) for plaintiff and responding party; Erica J. Saxum of DeHay Elliston LLP (510-285-0748) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of production of demonstrating that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that defendant acted with the requisite malice, fraud or oppression to warrant punitive damages. Plaintiffs' responses to defendant's special interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Order signed. The court will rule on plaintiff and defendant's objections once counsel re-submit a courtesy copy along with a proposed order. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of Aiken Welch, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
